results.definition_en: At this present time.
results.example_en: Come here now, please.

results.definition_en: Not inside; away from a place.
results.example_en: The cat ran out of the house.

results.definition_en: Up to and at this time, with no change.
results.example_en: She is still at school.

results.definition_en: At that time; or after that.
results.example_en: We went for a walk, then we had dinner.
results.example_zh_tw: 我們先去散步，然後吃晚餐。

results.definition_en: In that place, away from the person talking.
results.example_en: Put the box there, by the door.
results.example_zh_tw: 把箱子放在那邊，門旁邊。

results.definition_en: With one another; in one place or group.
results.example_en: We went to the park together.

results.definition_en: In a good way; or in a state of health.
results.example_en: She sings very well.

results.definition_en: Very near to, but not quite.
results.example_en: I am almost ready to go.
results.example_zh_tw: 我差不多準備好要走了。

results.definition_en: As much as one needs.
results.example_en: We have enough food for tonight.

results.definition_en: Word used to say a thing more surprising than one might think.
results.example_en: Even a child can do it.

results.definition_en: Not much; a small amount.
results.example_en: I have a little time before the meeting.
results.example_zh_tw: 開會前我還有一點時間。

results.definition_en: A great amount of a thing.
results.example_en: There is not much milk left.

results.definition_en: Word used to make a thing the opposite, or to say no.
results.example_en: I am not ready yet.

results.definition_en: No more than; nothing other than.
results.example_en: I have only one brother.

results.definition_en: Very much; or completely.
results.example_en: It is quite cold today.

results.definition_en: In this way; or to such a degree.
results.example_en: He is so tall!

results.definition_en: To a great degree; much.
results.example_en: She is very happy today.

results.definition_en: The day after today.
results.example_en: I will see you tomorrow.

results.definition_en: The day before today.
results.example_en: I saw her yesterday at the shop.

results.definition_en: The side of the earth opposite to south, where it is cold.
results.example_en: We are going to the north for our holiday.

results.definition_en: The side of the earth opposite to north, where it is hot.
results.example_en: Birds fly to the south for the winter.

results.definition_en: The side where the sun comes up.
results.example_en: The sun comes up in the east.

results.definition_en: The side where the sun goes down.
results.example_en: The sun goes down in the west.

results.definition_en: Word used to ask for a thing in a kind way.
results.example_en: Please give me a glass of water.

results.definition_en: Word used to say a thing is true, or to say one will do a thing.
results.example_en: Yes, I will come with you.
